name: Greater Manchester (United Kingdom, de facto)
description: A red field divided by a yellow saltire-and-cross composite, with a yellow worker bee in the centre and other symbols in the quarters.
history: An unofficial flag for the Greater Manchester metropolitan county. The worker bee — Manchester's traditional symbol of industry — features prominently. Greater Manchester has no Flag Institute–registered flag of its own.

features.symbolism: an unofficial design combining a worker bee and other heraldic elements representing the boroughs of Greater Manchester
